overall.description: Game engine footage (GTA V style) showing a first-person perspective walking along a multi-lane highway bridge with moderate vehicle traffic. The camera travels along the right sidewalk, crosses the road midway, and continues along the left shoulder with mountainous coastal terrain visible under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway bridge sidewalk with mountain view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right sidewalk of the highway bridge

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: weathered concrete barrier separating the sidewalk from the steep drop
multi-lane road with visible cracks and tire marks
wooden utility poles with multiple horizontal power lines
steep rocky mountainside with sparse evergreen vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along the narrow concrete sidewalk of a highway bridge. A concrete railing runs along the right side separating the path from a steep mountain drop, while multi-lane traffic passes by on the left. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting over the scene.

events.description: begins crossing the multi-lane highway from the right sidewalk toward the left shoulder

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge before stepping onto the asphalt to cross between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow semi-truck with trailer passing in the left lane

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the bridge before initiating a road crossing midway through the segment. The concrete railing falls behind as the camera steps onto the asphalt, moving between lanes of moderate traffic while the mountain terrain remains visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with coastal rock formations

events.description: reaches the left shoulder of the highway, now facing oncoming traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the left highway shoulder against the flow of traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan approaching from the distance in the left lane

entered.detail: silver metal guardrail with vertical posts along the road edge
large granite boulders and rocky outcrops visible beyond the guardrail

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the road, the camera now walks along the left highway shoulder with a metal guardrail on the right and coastal rock formations beyond. Vehicles now approach from the front, creating an opposing flow pattern, while power lines run parallel to the road on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a highway bridge, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk to the opposite shoulder. It begins with a walk along a concrete path bordered by a railing and a steep mountain drop, while multi-lane traffic flows on the left under a diffused, overcast sky. As the camera progresses, it leaves the sidewalk behind to cross the asphalt, weaving between lanes of moderate traffic with the mountain terrain remaining visible to the right. The scene then shifts as the camera reaches the far side, moving onto the left highway shoulder where a metal guardrail now separates the path from coastal rock formations. Finally, the perspective settles into a walk parallel to power lines, with vehicles now approaching from the front in an opposing flow.
